problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Two-dimensional. Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
